channel.title: Copley Family History
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Copley Family History

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Murray Grantee Search
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Murray Grantee Search This note captures the April 30, 2026 Claude for Chrome handoff for the Lewis County, West Virginia compiled grantee deed index search under the exact surname Murray.

item.title: Who Was Alive When
item.description: A time-first guide to the main Copley family figures, their overlapping lifespans, and the family events they lived through.

item.title: How to Read This Research
item.description: A short orientation guide for understanding the Copley family research vault, its evidence labels, major pages, and open questions.

item.title: Amy E. Copley Geist
item.description: Amy Elizabeth Copley Geist (b. July 11, 1990) 📊 View Family Tree for visual context.
